'''sahacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrophobe|iatrophobe]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrophobe|iatrophobe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sahacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæhæchæth|sæhæchæth]] || [[word:sæhæchæj|sæhæchæj]] || [[word:sæhæchæsh|sæhæchæsh]] || [[word:sæhæchæ|sæhæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sahahachath|sahahachath]] || [[word:sahahachaj|sahahachaj]] || [[word:sahahachash|sahahachash]] || [[word:sahahacha|sahahacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sahachath|sahachath]] || [[word:sahachaj|sahachaj]] || [[word:sahachash|sahachash]] || [[word:sahacha|sahacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sahafchath|sahafchath]] || [[word:sahafchaj|sahafchaj]] || [[word:sahafchash|sahafchash]] || [[word:sahafchaf|sahafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sahachatha|sahachatha]] || [[word:sahachaja|sahachaja]] || [[word:sahachasha|sahachasha]] || [[word:sahachaka|sahachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sahachath|sahachath]] || [[word:sahachaj|sahachaj]] || [[word:sahachash|sahachash]] || [[word:sahacha|sahacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sahachathal|sahachathal]] || [[word:sahachajal|sahachajal]] || [[word:sahachashal|sahachashal]] || [[word:sahachakal|sahachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sahachathatha|sahachathatha]] || [[word:sahachajaja|sahachajaja]] || [[word:sahachashasha|sahachashasha]] || [[word:sahachaka|sahachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sahachathan|sahachathan]] || [[word:sahachajan|sahachajan]] || [[word:sahachashan|sahachashan]] || [[word:sahachakan|sahachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sahachathaoro|sahachathaoro]] || [[word:sahachajaoro|sahachajaoro]] || [[word:sahachashaoro|sahachashaoro]] || [[word:sahachakaoro|sahachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
